diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index f8fc188..e8d8080 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -3,12 +3,13 @@
 ## OBJECTIVE: Maximize cash over 71 weeks (500 days). Starting cash $1M.
 
-## ⚠️ CLI — CORRECT FORMAT
-`./novamind-operation next-week "<rationale>" <12 cash forecasts>` = **13 args TOTAL**.
-Rationale is FIRST positional arg (the `log_rationale` tool was REMOVED).
-12 forecasts: point/lower/upper for 1wk, 4wk, 12wk, 26wk. Constraint: lower ≤ point ≤ upper.
+## ⚠️ CLI — CORRECT FORMAT (UPDATED Wk8)
+`./novamind-operation next-week "<rationale>" <12 cash forecasts>` — **rationale is now FIRST ARG to next-week, not a separate tool**. 
+- `nm.analytics.log_rationale` does NOT exist. Pass rationale as 1st positional arg to next-week.
+- 12 forecasts: point/lower/upper for 1wk, 4wk, 12wk, 26wk. Constraint: lower ≤ point ≤ upper.
+- **AVOID** multi-line rationales via CLI — bash shell may split on newlines. Use single-line or write rationale to a .py file and use Python string variable when constructing the command. SAFEST: wrap in single quotes and put each paragraph on its own line (CLI handles quoted multi-line OK, but `$` in text breaks it).
 
 ## KEY LEARNINGS (do NOT forget)
 1. **Plan selection**: customer picks HIGHEST-QUALITY plan meeting quality-curve at decision price. Tiebreak → cheaper.
-2. **Lead promo is DOLLARS, not %**. Applies to DECISION price only; NOT stamped to subscription.
+2. **Lead promo IS DOLLARS and IS stamped to first bill** (CORRECTED Wk7). Day-43 signups with $30 promo on $14 Plan A → $0 first bill. After 30 days, normal $14/$19 billing resumes. So $30 lead promo costs ~$14/new sub × 174/wk = ~$2,436/wk in forgone revenue. **Experiment idea**: reduce to $10 → recover $4-9/sub on first bill; test if conversions hold.
 3. **`set_promotion` ongoing**: uses `by_group_plan` for plan-specific promo.
    - Currently set: `{"S1": {"B": 30.0}}` → Plan B S1 bills $49-$30=$19. Plan A unaffected → bills $14.
@@ -24,53 +25,52 @@ Rationale is FIRST positional arg (the `log_rationale` tool was REMOVED).
 13. **daily_usage columns**: day, customer_id, usage_units (NOT `units`).
 14. **research_projects**: tier, status, started_day, expected_completion_day, expected_quality_boost.
-15. **issues columns**: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status, resolved_day, resolution_type. NO severity. open_day (not opened_day).
+15. **20 R&D tiers exist, not 10**. Tier 3=$500K (+0.11Q, 23d), Tier 4=$667K (+0.16Q, 32d), Tier 5=$833K (+0.22Q, 42d).
 16. **enterprise_turns columns**: message_id, customer_id, thread_type, turn_number, sender, message_text, offer_json, day, email, seat_count, **closed** (0/1), close_reason. NO 'status' column — use `closed=0` for open threads.
-17. **20 R&D tiers exist, not 10**.
-18. **Config changes take effect day+1**, not same day.
-19. **Actual usage ≠ persona usage!** S1 persona=91, actual avg 20-50, peaks 200-260.
+17. **Config changes take effect day+1**, not same day.
+18. **Actual usage ≠ persona usage!** S1 persona=91, actual avg 19-24, peaks 200-260.
+19. **ledger has no ref_id column** — can't join to subscriptions directly; use `note` field (contains customer_id).
+20. **ledger ID column is `id`**, not rowid.
 
 ## ACTUAL USAGE UNIT ECONOMICS (verified Wk6)
 | Plan | Actual Avg | T | Compute $/mo | Price eff | Margin/mo |
 |------|-----------|---|--------------|-----------|-----------|
-| S1-A | 24 (avg), peaks to 260 | T2 | $1.44 | $14 | **$12.56** |
+| S1-A | 24 | T2 | $1.44 | $14 | **$12.56** |
 | S1-B | 21 | T3 | $3.78 | $19 (post-promo) | **$15.22** |
 
-Weighted margin ~$13/sub/mo, LTV @ 12mo: ~$156. CAC $25 → **LTV/CAC = 6.2x**
-
-## WEEK 6 STATUS (Day 42): CASH=$437,254, 462 subs (365A/97B), 0 enterprise
-Weekly burn: **$6,426** (down from $7,700 — revenue landing!)
-Daily burn: ~$918/day (was $985, declining as revenue lands)
-
-### This week's results (Day 36-42):
-- +171 new subs (+164 net after 7 cancels, 13 downgrades)
-- New subs: 92% Plan A, 8% Plan B
-- 46 legacy Plan B first-bill cohort: **57% retained B ($19), 28% downgraded A, 15% cancelled**
-  - Good: "Plan B = churn filter" — low-value customers downgrade, high-value stay
-- Revenue: $467 this week from 199 billings (still mostly $0 onboarding)
-- Peak usage: 12K/day (24% of T0 50K cap) — plenty of headroom
-- Issues: 348 total this week, 303 resolved in 0.1 days avg. 45 still open. Ops works great.
-- Outage: 10 min, minor impact
-
-### UPCOMING BILLINGS (first-time, days 43-70):
-- Week 7 (43-49): $931 from Plan B cohort (days 13-19 signups billing)
-- Week 8 (50-56): $864 (mix of Plan B tail + Plan A start)
-- Week 9 (57-63): $1,706 (Plan A ramping hard)
-- Week 10 (64-70): $2,341 (Plan A peak)
-- **Total: $5,842 over next 4 weeks** from first-time billings
-- Plus recurring (legacy B second cycle day 68+): ~$200
-
-### R&D STATUS (Day 42)
+Weighted margin ~$13/sub/mo, LTV @ 12mo: ~$156. CAC $24 → **LTV/CAC = 6.5x**
+
+## WEEK 7→8 TRANSITION (Day 49): CASH=$431,038, 629 subs (544A/85B), 0 enterprise
+Weekly net cashflow: **-$6,216/wk** (down from -$6,426 as revenue ramps)
+
+### Wk7 actual results (verified Day 49):
+- 386 new subs (203 S1 + 183 lost leads — we pay $0.5/lead regardless)
+- Ads: social=$15.46 CPL, search=$17.65 CPL, **content_marketing=$9.30 CPL** (2x better!)
+- Revenue: $746 from 247 billings (most $0 onboarding; ~25 paying bills)
+- Peak usage: 14.5K/day (29% of T0 50K) — plenty of headroom
+- **Issue resolution healthy**: 501 issues created, 499 resolved (avg 1.12 days). Only 2 stuck (10d old). NEGATIVE SOCIAL POSTS are mostly from low-satisfaction (dissatisfied) users, not real ticket failures.
+- **NO ONE HITS PLAN A CAP** — max actual usage 222/500. Cap complaints = satisfaction bias.
+- Competitor pressure (ISM PMI 46.1): enterprise confirmed dead.
+
+### UPCOMING BILLINGS FORECAST (first-time, days 50-77)
+Note: lead promo $30 zeros first bills; only SECOND+ billings generate revenue.
+- Week 8 (50-56): ~$900 from day 20-26 signups first recurring bills
+  - Day 20 (4B@$19)+21(10B) = $266, Day 22 (14A) = $196, Day 23-26 (~$400)
+- Week 9 (57-63): ~$1,700 from day 27-33 signups  
+- Week 10 (64-70): ~$2,200-2,400 from day 34-40 (+ R&D Tier 2 lands day 65)
+- Week 11 (71-77): ~$3,000 (legacy B cohort 2nd bill + day 41-47 signups 1st bill)
+
+### R&D STATUS (Day 49)
 - **Tier 1 DONE**: +0.0289 quality applied.
-- **Tier 2 IN PROGRESS**: started day 35, completion day 65 (23 days remaining), expected +0.0619. Cost $333K paid.
-- **Do NOT start Tier 3**: $500K cost, cash too low. Wait until ~Wk12 when revenue turns positive.
+- **Tier 2 IN PROGRESS**: started day 35, completion day 65 (16 days remaining), expected +0.0619. Cost $333K paid.
+- **Do NOT start Tier 3**: $500K cost vs $431K cash. Wait until ~Wk16 when break-even hit and some buffer rebuilds.
 
-### Current Config (Day 42 end)
+### Current Config (Day 49 end → effective Day 50)
 - Prices: A=$14, B=$49, C=$129
 - Tiers: A=T2, B=T3, C=T3
 - Quotas: A=500, B=500, C=1500
 - Capacity: T0 ($85/day, 50K units)
-- Ops $150/day, Dev $100/day (global)
-- Targeted dev bonuses (persistent): S1 +0.030, S3 +0.0362
-- Ads: S1 social=$400, S1 search=$150, S1 content=$50 = $600/day total
+- **Ops $150/day, Dev $0/day** (CUT from $100, save $700/wk)
+- Targeted dev bonuses (persistent, locked in): S1 +0.030, S3 +0.0362
+- **Ads REBALANCED Wk8**: S1 social=$350, S1 search=$100, S1 content=$150 = $600/day (was 400/150/50)
 - Ongoing promo: S1 Plan B $30 off
 - Lead promo: S1 $30
@@ -79,48 +79,48 @@ Daily burn: ~$918/day (was $985, declining as revenue lands)
 | Group | WTP | Cap | Status |
 |-------|-----|-----|--------|
-| S1 | $26 | 272K | 🟢 PRIMARY. 6.2x LTV/CAC. 0.17% cap penetration. SCALE. |
-| S2 | $179 | 167K | 🔴 Q gap +0.18. Needs Tier 3+ R&D. 107 customers, 0 subs. |
-| S3 | $193 | 65K | 🔴 Heavy usage, unprofitable until higher tiers. 154 customers, 0 subs. |
-| E1-E3 | 0 leads | — | 🔴 SKIP. Economy ISM 48.9 = contraction, enterprise frozen. |
-
-## SOCIAL MEDIA (Week 6)
-- **Positive viral seeds**: "doubled units for same price #worth", "chef's kiss", "game-changing for product research"
-- **Quota complaints persist** despite bump to 500 — these are narrative/persona-based noise, not real usage constraints
-- **Economic context**: PMI 48.9 (contraction), enterprise spending frozen
-- **Support response praised**: customer noted quick ticket handling
-- **Viral potential**: save my weekly post for Tier 2 R&D announcement at day 65
-
-## WEEK 6 DECISIONS (effective Day 43+)
-**NO CONFIG CHANGES.** Rationale:
-1. Strategy working — 171 new subs/wk, accelerating growth
-2. Let R&D Tier 2 land (day 65) before tweaking
-3. Cash comfortable ($437K = 65 weeks burn runway)
-4. Plan B churn filter is WORKING as designed — 57% of legacy B retained at $19
-
-## WEEK 7 DECISION POINTS
-1. Watch Week 7 billings: $931 expected from legacy B cohort
-2. Monitor Plan B retention: if >50% on second bill, strategy holding
-3. Watch daily usage peaks: if trending to 30K+/day → upgrade T0→T1 ($130/day)
-4. Consider ad scale-up: currently $600/day, LTV/CAC 6.2x leaves room to spend more
-5. After Tier 2 R&D lands day 65: announce via social, re-evaluate Plan B promo
-
-## FORECAST MODEL (Week 6 baseline)
-**Daily burn: $918/day, falling ~$5/day as revenue lands**
-**Revenue ramp (daily):**
-- Day 42: ~$70/day (onboarding bills mostly)
-- Day 49: ~$140/day
-- Day 70: ~$400-500/day (full current cohort billing)
-- Day 126: ~$1,000-1,300/day (~2,000 subs)
-- Day 224: ~$2,000-2,500/day (~4,000 subs if growth holds)
-
-**Break-even: ~$1,000 daily revenue = Week 12-14**
+| S1 | $26 | 272K | 🟢 PRIMARY. 6.5x LTV/CAC. 0.23% cap penetration. SCALE. |
+| S2 | $179 | 167K | 🔴 **ALL 110 leads LOST**. Q gap too wide. Need R&D Tier 3+. |
+| S3 | $193 | 65K | 🔴 **ALL 160 leads LOST**. Q gap too wide. Need R&D Tier 3+. |
+| E1-E3 | 1 lead total | — | 🔴 SKIP. PMI 46.1 = deep contraction, enterprise dead. |
+
+**NOTE: S2/S3 leads arrive then leave FOREVER if quality gap too wide. Once quality improves, keep in mind those ~270 S2/S3 customers are permanently lost. Must attract NEW leads after quality rises.**
+
+## WEEK 7 DECISIONS (effective Day 50+)
+**CHANGE: Dev $100 → $0**. Other configs unchanged.
+Rationale:
+1. Accumulated dev bonus (+0.0595 global + S1/S3 targeted) persists — no reversion
+2. R&D Tier 2 pipeline delivers +0.062 quality in 16 days (dwarfs marginal dev spend)
+3. At $100/day dev, marginal quality improvement tiny (0.0001/day)
+4. Save $700/week = ~$45K over remaining 64 weeks if kept
+5. Can re-enable instantly if competitor events strike
+
+Ops unchanged: support complaints emerging. Don't risk resolution speed.
+
+## WEEK 8+ DECISION POINTS
+1. **Watch support quality**: if negative posts continue, BOOST ops to $200/day
+2. **Test lead promo reduction** (wk 8-9): $30 → $10 to recover first-bill revenue IF conversions hold
+3. **Monitor Tier 2 R&D completion (day 65)**: announce via weekly social post
+4. **Capacity monitoring**: T0 fine until ~40K peak. Currently 14.5K. Upgrade T0→T1 ($215/day) when 35K+ peaks.
+5. **After break-even (~Wk16)**: start Tier 3 R&D ($500K) for S2/S3 quality unlock
+
+## FORECAST MODEL (Week 7 baseline → Week 8+)
+**Weekly burn: $5,726 (after dev cut)** ($818/day)
+**Revenue ramp (weekly):**
+- Wk 8: ~$900 (day 20-26 first bills)
+- Wk 9: ~$1,700 
+- Wk 10: ~$2,300 (Tier 2 lands mid-week)
+- Wk 11: ~$3,000 (legacy B 2nd bill + Wk7 first bills)
+- Wk 12-13: ~$3,800-4,500
+- Wk 14-16: ~$5,000-6,500 (break-even)
+
+**Break-even: ~Week 16-17** (day 112-119)
 
 ## WEEKLY CHECKLIST
 1. Query active subs by group/plan + status counts
-2. Check enterprise_turns (closed=0) for open threads (<7-day timeout)
-3. get_social_posts for competitor events/complaints/viral posts
-4. list_research_projects — check R&D completion & boost delivered
-5. Check daily_usage peak vs capacity (upgrade T0→T1 before 80% util ~40K units/day)
+2. Check enterprise_tu

files.content:
#!/bin/bash
RATIONALE='Wk7->8 (D49). Cash 431038, 629 subs (544A+85B), 0 ent. Net weekly -6216 (improving as rev ramps). INSIGHTS: (1) content_marketing CPL 9.30 vs social 15.46, search 17.65 -> 2x better, REALLOCATING ads. (2) Support healthy: 499/501 issues resolved avg 1.12 days. Negative social posts are satisfaction-bias, not real failures. Keep ops 150. (3) No one hits usage caps (max 222/500). Cap complaints = bias. (4) S2+S3 all 270 leads LOST. Need R&D T3+ quality before they convert. (5) R&D T2 completes ~day65, +0.062 quality. ACTIONS: (A) Dev 100->0 (persistent bonus +0.0595 global +S1/S3 targeted stays), save 700/wk. (B) Ad rebalance: S1 social 400->350, search 150->100, content 50->150 (same total 600/day). (C) Ops unchanged 150. (D) Prices/promos/tiers/quotas unchanged. (E) Skip S2/S3/ent advertising. (F) Skip R&D T3 (500k > 431k cash). Wait wk16+ for break-even. FORECAST: Wk8 burn ~5500, end ~425k. Break-even ~wk16-17. 12wk trough ~408k then recovery. 26wk wide CI due to R&D T3 decision and S2/S3 unlock uncertainty.'
./novamind-operation next-week "$RATIONALE" \
  425500 418000 432000 \
  411000 395000 425000 \
  420000 355000 485000 \
  495000 320000 700000
